Off Calendar Apr-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Steven Mains, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a National Banking Association.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendantS: CHARLES MIZE STUDIO INC., a Corp., and CHARLES E. MIZE as follows:
Principal of $49,063.18
Interest $9,866.02
Attorney's fees of $940.00
Costs of $395.56
For the total of $60,264.76.
Judgment signed in open court.
